entities.description: gradient er is a gradient based entity resolution method mentioned in the text
basic er is a method used to merge same name entities  replacing gradient er in the described scenario
w o gradient er is a scenario or condition described where the gradient based entity resolution is replaced
same name entities are the specific entities targeted for merging in the basic er process

relations.description: basic er replaces gradient er by merging same name entities
the  w o gradient er  scenario involves the replacement of gradient er
the  w o gradient er  scenario involves the use of basic er as the replacement method
basic er is the method used to merge same name entities
